sections.heading: About J & W Foreign Auto Service
body: J & W Foreign Auto Service is a family-run repair shop at 401 S Main Street in Sebastopol, serving Sonoma County drivers who want their import vehicles cared for by people who know them inside and out. The shop has a particular love for Volkswagens — both classic air-cooled Bugs and Buses and modern water-cooled models.

Customers consistently describe the team as honest, knowledgeable and genuinely helpful, whether they are tracking down a pesky electrical fault or getting a beloved older VW back on the road. The shop holds a 4.8-star rating across 27 reviews.
highlights: Family-run import auto shop in Sebastopol
